response: A 45-year-old female patient has a BMI of 27.3, indicating overweight status, and presents with elevated blood pressure (138/88 mmHg), borderline-high cholesterol (225 mg/dL), and fasting glucose levels of 110 mg/dL, suggestive of prediabetes. She does not smoke, engages in exercise twice weekly, and has a family history of diabetes, specifically her mother, which may increase her risk for metabolic conditions.
